features.title: Instant Results
features.description: Upload your file and get processed results in seconds — no waiting in queues.

features.title: Privacy First
features.description: All files are automatically deleted after 1 hour. We never store or share your data.

features.title: AI-Powered Quality
features.description: Powered by industry-leading models including Stable Diffusion and GFPGAN.

features.title: Pay Only for What You Use
features.description: Get 5 free credits every month. No forced subscriptions — buy credits as needed.

faqs.q: What can I do with free credits?
faqs.a: You get 5 free credits every month. That's enough to remove 2 backgrounds, convert 5 PDFs, or generate 1 avatar.
Free tier credits reset monthly. Paid plan credits refresh with your billing cycle.
All uploaded files are automatically deleted from our servers after 1 hour. We never store or share your images.

faqs.q: What AI models do you use?
faqs.a: We use industry-leading models via Replicate API, including Stable Diffusion for image generation and GFPGAN for photo restoration.

faqs.q: Can I use the results commercially?
faqs.a: Yes. You retain full ownership of all input and output files. Use them for personal or commercial projects.
We accept PNG, JPG, and WebP for image tools. PDF files up to 20MB for document conversion.

about.title: About AI ToolBox Online
about.subtitle: Our mission and story
about.missionText: AI ToolBox Online was built with a simple idea: everyone should have access to powerful AI tools without expensive software subscriptions or technical expertise. Whether you're a small business owner creating professional avatars, a student converting PDFs for assignments, or a designer removing watermarks — our tools are designed to be fast, intuitive, and accessible from any device.
offerItems: Background Remover — One-click background removal for any image
AI Avatar Generator — Transform photos into cartoon, anime, or professional avatars
Watermark Remover — Erase watermarks, logos, and text from images
Photo Restorer — Restore and colorize old, blurry, or damaged photos
PDF to Word — Convert PDF documents to editable Word files
about.howItWorksText: We use industry-leading AI models via Replicate API — including Stable Diffusion for image generation and GFPGAN for photo restoration. All processing happens in the cloud; you just upload your file and get results in seconds. Files are automatically deleted after 1 hour to protect your privacy.
about.pricingText: We believe in transparent, pay-as-you-go pricing. No monthly subscriptions forced on you. Get 5 free credits every month, and only pay when you need more. Every tool shows its credit cost upfront so there are no surprises.
about.contactText: Have questions or feedback? Reach us at jzerov@live.com or visit our contact page.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.emailDesc: For general inquiries, support, or feedback:
contact.responseText: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours. For urgent matters, please include "URGENT" in your email subject line.

faq.q: How do I get more credits?
faq.a: Visit our Pricing page to purchase credits starting from $4.99 for 50 credits.

faq.q: My file processing failed. What should I do?
faq.a: Please email us with the tool name, file type, and any error message you received. We'll investigate and refund credits if needed.

faq.q: Can I use the outputs commercially?
faq.a: Yes. You retain full ownership of all files you upload and generate through our tools.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.text: We collect minimal information necessary to provide our services:
list: Account Information: Email address and name when you create an account.
Usage Data: Tool usage logs for billing and credit management.
Payment Data: Processed securely by Stripe. We do not store your payment card details.

sections.title: 2. File Handling
sections.text: All uploaded files and processed outputs are automatically deleted from our servers within 1 hour of processing. We do not store, share, or use your images for training AI models. You retain full ownership of all files you upload and generate.

sections.title: 3. Third-Party Services
sections.text: We use the following third-party services to deliver our platform:
list: Replicate API: For AI image processing (avatar generation, background removal, photo restoration).
Cloudflare R2: For temporary file storage during processing.
sections.note: Each service operates under its own privacy policy.

sections.title: 4. Data Security
sections.text: We use industry-standard encryption (HTTPS/TLS) for all data in transit. Authentication tokens are stored securely in your browser's local storage. We regularly review our security practices.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
sections.text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. To request account deletion, contact us at jzerov@live.com.

sections.title: 6. Contact
sections.text: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at jzerov@live.com.

sections.title: 1. Service Description
sections.text: AI ToolBox Online provides AI-powered image processing and document conversion tools, including background removal, avatar generation, watermark removal, photo restoration, and PDF-to-Word conversion. Service availability is subject to third-party API availability.

sections.title: 2. Acceptable Use
sections.text: You may use our tools for personal and commercial purposes. You retain full ownership of your input and output files. You agree not to:
list: Use our service to process content that violates applicable laws or infringes on others' rights.
Automate or scrape our service without permission.
Share your account credentials or resell our credits.

sections.title: 3. Credits and Billing
sections.text: Free accounts receive 5 credits per month. Paid credits are purchased via Stripe and refresh with your billing cycle. Unused paid credits roll over within the same billing cycle. Free tier credits reset monthly. Unused credits are non-refundable.

sections.title: 4. Refunds
sections.text: Unused credits are non-refundable. If you experience issues with our service, please contact us at jzerov@live.com for a resolution. We will make every reasonable effort to address your concerns.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
sections.text: AI ToolBox Online is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of our service.

sections.title: 6. Intellectual Property
sections.text: The AI ToolBox Online platform, including its design, code, and branding, is protected by intellectual property rights. You retain ownership of your uploaded files and generated outputs.

sections.title: 7. Changes to Terms
sections.text: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.text: For any questions regarding these terms, contact us at jzerov@live.com.
